name: Broccoli with Lemon and Garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam the broccoli until tender but firm, about 4-6 minutes.
2. Meanwhile, mince the garlic.
3. Heat the olive oil in a nonstick skillet over medium heat. Add the minced garlic and sauté for one minute.
4. Add the cooked broccoli, lemon juice, and salt to taste. Cook briefly to combine.
Nutritional info per serving: 281 cal; 10g pro, 21g carb, 21g fat (61%)
